Skill Details:
1. On the World Map, tap your base to see the "Skill".
2. Tap "Skill", and tap a base with a GREEN mark on it on the World Map.
3. Tap that base and then - "Interact" to release the skill.
4. This skill will not gain you any attributes. It's only for visual effect.

1. On the World Map, tap your base to see the "Skill".
2. Tap "Skill" to activate the attribute.
3. You can only use this skill for your base.
Randomly get 1~3 Relics in the Deep chests

{0} Attack boost to all units in the selected march queue
March time reduces by {1}
Buff for you and your Allies in your Aura: All units Attack +30%. Buff for you (only): All units HP +30%.

1. On the world map, tap on your base to see the "Skill" button.
2. Tap on the name of the skill to use it.
3. This skill can only be used on your own base.
4. If you use this skill and then set the defense troop in your War Hall, and then the buff expires, the march size will be reduced and goes back to normal.
5. However, if you use this skill and then set a defense troop in the Dimensional Mine and Warzone Exercise, after the buff expires the march size will not go back to normal until the next time you set the defense troop.
When releasing the skill, buff you and your allies: Attack +40% to all units, and also buff you (only): Attack +20% to all units. Lasts 15 minutes
